MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Set For Trial On Nov-19-09 At 11:10 A.M. In Dept 318

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-19-2009 Continued To Nov-19-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Marte Bassi, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-20-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Appellant/Defendant Yi Xuan Zhao present, with Cantonese interpreters (and witnesses) Sandy Zhao and Wilson Zhao.
Respondent/Plaintiff Yuk Ping Yu Lee present, with Mandarin interpreter Ai Qin Zlou.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties, witnesses and interpreters are sworn.

Yuk Ping Yu Lee testifies on her own behalf, through the Mandarin interpreter. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1 - Photo Book
Exhibit 2 - Gray Binder

Yi Xuan Zhao testifies on his own behalf, through the Cantonese interpreter Sandy Zhao.
Sandy Zhao also testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant. The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit A - Black Binder

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. All exhibits are retained.

Judge Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: V. Mack, Not Reported (Dept. 318)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-09-2009 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Continued To Oct-06-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
